placeholderImages.description: SafeHive Control Hub featuring a brushed stainless steel NEMA-rated enclosure with a transparent front panel and SAFEHIVE branding. Inside, industrial DIN rails mount an NVIDIA Jetson AI Edge compute module, a Safety PLC for Black Channel guard protocols, a PROFINET field gateway, and a ROS2 edge bridge. The bottom features multiple high-integrity cable glands with neatly routed industrial wiring.
